message.content:
Of course! Here's a draft for your Slack message:

---

Hey [Manager's Name],

Hope you’re doing well! I wanted to chat with you about my role and see if there's any possibility for an adjustment in my compensation. I feel like I've been contributing a lot to our team and projects, and I’d love to continue doing so at a level that reflects my efforts and the value I bring to the team.

Let me know what you think!

Thanks,
[Your Name]

---

This keeps it personal and open but still professional. Adjust the details as needed to fit your conversation style!
